name: Themectl Dev Store
description: Repositório local de temas para testes internos do projeto themectl.

themes.name: nexus-desktop
themes.description: Tema de exemplo exportado do desktop KDE Plasma atual. Inclui esquema de cores KvMojave, wallpaper e estilo Plasma darkly.
themes.author: nexus

themes.name: catppuccin-mocha
themes.description: Tema pastel Catppuccin Mocha para KDE Plasma 6. Esquema de cores oficial (acento Mauve) e wallpaper em gradiente.
themes.author: Catppuccin

themes.name: se7enaero
themes.description: A modern Windows 7-like theme for KDE plasma.
themes.author: LinLinXZA

themes.name: claude-code
themes.description: Warm-dark Global Theme with the Claude coral accent.
themes.author: Hodahel Moinzadeh (HodyTech)
